case_title: ANNE LA FRENIERE ET AL VS. SEAN LUKENS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LA FRENIERE, ANNE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUKENS, SEAN $446.78 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $446.78, DEFENDANT SEAN LUKENS SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF ANNE LA FRENIERE. DEFENDANTS DELORES OPERATIONS; MELANIE LUKENS AND DIANE LITKE ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF ANNETTE DOZIER LA FRENIERE SHALL RECOVER NOTHING. SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-15-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-15-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM RICHARD GROTCH. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DIANE LUKEN WHO WAS NOT PRESENT AT THE HEARING. DEFENDANT MELANIE LUKENS IS DECEASED. DEFENDANT DOLORES OPERATIONS WAS REPRESENTED BY DOLORES MALATAG--SECREATARY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANTS MELANIE LUKENS AND DIANE LITKE. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: RICHARD GROTCH. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
